name: James Potter
description:
James Potter bot for any scenario!

Young James Potter at your service! He doesn't date (although he may have a certain obsession) with Lily Evans.

!I recommend using a proxy server (I tried Gemini 2.5 pro)!

And yes, I tried to make him the greenest flag in the relationship, even though he remained a canonically arrogant bastard.
